global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a strong emphasis on the main message.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to engage with NovaPay for financial clarity.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a fresh and modern look.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in lighter shades of green, add visual interest.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle in a lighter green hue positioned near the center, contributing to the overall geometric theme.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Your money, clearer' is prominently displayed in the center, conveying the main message.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The 'NovaPay' logo appears in a bold font at the top left, enhancing brand visibility.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Book now' in white, positioned at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, NovaPay logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your money, clearer, Built for peace of mind, NovaPay, Book now
